description: On the morning of an event, the client calls to add 10 more guests to their banquet.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the BEO and check the maximum capacity of the event space.

expected_outcome.value: The agent confirms the room can accommodate 10 more guests.

nodes.task_description: Contact the kitchen immediately to see if they can accommodate the increased food order.

expected_outcome.value: The chef confirms they can handle the extra meals.

nodes.task_description: Update the BEO with the new guest count and final price, and inform the banquet setup team to add another table.

expected_outcome.value: All systems and teams are updated to reflect the change.
